across.rawDefinition: (crosswords, often in combination) A word that runs horizontally in the completed puzzle grid or its associated clue.

actor.rawDefinition: A person who performs, plays a part in a theatrical play or film.

actress.rawDefinition: A female who performs on the stage or in films.

add.rawDefinition: An act or instance of adding.

afraid.rawDefinition: (usually used predicatively, not attributively, be afraid) Impressed with fear or apprehension; in fear.

after.rawDefinition: Later; second (of two); next, following, subsequent

afternoon.rawDefinition: The part of the day from noon or lunchtime until sunset, evening, or suppertime or 6pm.

age.rawDefinition: The whole duration of a being, whether animal, plant, or other kind, being alive.

ago.rawDefinition: Gone; gone by; gone away; passed; passed away.

air.rawDefinition: The substance constituting earth's atmosphere, particularly:

airport.rawDefinition: An airfield (an area designated for the takeoff and landing of aircraft), including one or more runways and (for commercial airports) one or more passenger terminals.

all.rawDefinition: (with a possessive pronoun) Everything that one is capable of.

also.rawDefinition: (focus) In addition; besides; as well; further; too.

always.rawDefinition: At all times; throughout all time; since the beginning.

and.rawDefinition: In rhythm, the second half of a divided beat.

animal.rawDefinition: In scientific usage, a multicellular organism that is usually mobile, whose cells are not encased in a rigid cell wall (distinguishing it from plants and fungi) and which derives energy solely from the consumption of other organisms (distinguishing it from plants).

another.rawDefinition: An additional one of the same kind.

answer.rawDefinition: A response or reply; something said or done in reaction to a statement or question.

any.rawDefinition: To even the slightest extent, at all.

around.rawDefinition: (with the verb "to be") Present in the vicinity.

arrive.rawDefinition: To reach; to get to a certain place.

art.rawDefinition: The conscious production or arrangement of sounds, colours, forms, movements, or other elements in a manner that affects the senses and emotions, usually specifically the production of the beautiful in a graphic or plastic medium.

as.rawDefinition: To such an extent or degree; to the same extent or degree.

ask.rawDefinition: An act or instance of asking.

at.rawDefinition: To reply to or talk to someone, either online or face-to-face. (from the practice of targeting a message or reply to someone online by writing @name)

aunt.rawDefinition: The sister or sister-in-law of one’s parent.

autumn.rawDefinition: Traditionally the third of the four seasons, when deciduous trees lose their leaves; typically regarded as being from September 24 to December 22 in parts of the Northern Hemisphere, and the months of March, April and May in the Southern Hemisphere.

away.rawDefinition: To depart; to go to another place.

baby.rawDefinition: A very young human, particularly from birth to a couple of years old or until walking is fully mastered.

back.rawDefinition: The rear of the body, especially the part between the neck and the end of the spine and opposite the chest and belly.

bag.rawDefinition: A flexible container made of cloth, paper, plastic, etc.

ball.rawDefinition: A solid or hollow sphere, or roughly spherical mass.

banana.rawDefinition: An elongated curved tropical fruit that grows in bunches and has a creamy flesh and a smooth skin.

band.rawDefinition: A strip of material used for strengthening or coupling.

bank.rawDefinition: An institution where one can place and borrow money and take care of financial affairs.

bath.rawDefinition: A tub or pool which is used for bathing: bathtub.

bathroom.rawDefinition: A room containing a shower and/or bathtub, and (typically but not necessarily) a toilet.

beach.rawDefinition: The shore of a body of water, especially when sandy or pebbly.

beautiful.rawDefinition: Someone who is beautiful. Can be used as a term of address.

best.rawDefinition: The supreme effort one can make, or has made.

better.rawDefinition: An entity, usually animate, deemed superior to another; one who has a claim to precedence; a superior.

between.rawDefinition: A kind of needle, shorter than a sharp, with a small rounded eye, used for making fine stitches on heavy fabrics.

bicycle.rawDefinition: A vehicle that has two wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.

big.rawDefinition: Someone or something that is large in stature

bike.rawDefinition: A vehicle that has two wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.

bill.rawDefinition: Any of various bladed or pointed hand weapons, originally designating an Anglo-Saxon sword, and later a weapon of infantry, especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, commonly consisting of a broad, heavy, double-edged, hook-shaped blade, with a short pike at the back and another at the top, attached to the end of a long staff.

bird.rawDefinition: A member of the class of animals Aves in the phylum Chordata, characterized by being warm-blooded, having feathers and wings usually capable of flight, and laying eggs.

birthday.rawDefinition: The anniversary of the day on which someone is born.

black.rawDefinition: The colour/color perceived in the absence of light, but also when no light is reflected, but rather absorbed.

blog.rawDefinition: A website that allows users to reflect, share opinions, and discuss various topics in the form of an online journal, sometimes letting readers comment on their posts. Most blogs are written in a slightly informal tone (personal journals, news, businesses, etc.)

blonde.rawDefinition: A pale yellowish (golden brown) color, especially said of hair color.

blue.rawDefinition: The colour of the clear sky or the deep sea, between green and violet in the visible spectrum, and one of the primary additive colours for transmitted light; the colour obtained by subtracting red and green from white light using magenta and cyan filters; or any colour resembling this.

boat.rawDefinition: A craft used for transportation of goods, fishing, racing, recreational cruising, or military use on or in the water, propelled by oars or outboard motor or inboard motor or by wind.

book.rawDefinition: A collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge, containing printed or written material, pictures, etc.

boot.rawDefinition: A heavy shoe that covers part of the leg.

born.rawDefinition: To carry or convey, literally or figuratively.

both.rawDefinition: Each of the two, or of the two kinds.

bottle.rawDefinition: A container, typically made of glass or plastic and having a tapered neck, used primarily for holding liquids.

box.rawDefinition: Senses relating to a three-dimensional object or space.

boyfriend.rawDefinition: A male partner in an unmarried romantic relationship.

bread.rawDefinition: A foodstuff made by baking dough made from cereals.

break.rawDefinition: An instance of breaking something into two or more pieces.

building.rawDefinition: The act or process by which something is built; construction.

bus.rawDefinition: A motor vehicle for transporting large numbers of people along roads.

but.rawDefinition: An instance or example of using the word "but".

butter.rawDefinition: A soft, fatty foodstuff made by churning the cream of milk (generally cow's milk).

buy.rawDefinition: Something which is bought; a purchase.

by.rawDefinition: A flying insect, of the clade Anthophila within the hymenopteran superfamily Apoidea, known for its organised societies (though only a minority have them), for collecting pollen and (in some species) producing wax and honey.

cafe.rawDefinition: A convenience store, originally one that sold coffee and similar basic items.

cake.rawDefinition: A rich, sweet dessert food, typically made of flour, sugar and eggs and baked in an oven, and often covered in icing.

camera.rawDefinition: A device for taking still or moving pictures or photographs.

can.rawDefinition: (auxiliary verb, defective) To know how to; to be able to.

car.rawDefinition: A wheeled vehicle that moves independently, with at least three wheels, powered mechanically, steered by a driver and mostly for personal transportation.

carrot.rawDefinition: A vegetable with a nutritious, juicy, sweet root that is often orange in colour, Daucus carota, especially the subspecies sativus in the family Apiaceae.

carry.rawDefinition: A manner of transporting or lifting something; the grip or position in which something is carried.

cat.rawDefinition: An animal of the family Felidae:

cent.rawDefinition: (money) A subunit of currency equal to one-hundredth of the main unit of currency in many countries. Symbol: ¢.

centre.rawDefinition: The point in the interior of a circle that is equidistant from all points on the circumference.

chair.rawDefinition: An item of furniture used to sit on or in, comprising a seat, legs, back, and sometimes arm rests, for use by one person. Compare stool, couch, sofa, settee, loveseat and bench.

chocolate.rawDefinition: A food made from ground roasted cocoa beans.

choose.rawDefinition: To pick; to make the choice of; to select.

cinema.rawDefinition: A movie theatre, a movie house

city.rawDefinition: A large settlement, bigger than a town; sometimes with a specific legal definition, depending on the place.

class.rawDefinition: A group, collection, category or set sharing characteristics or attributes.

classroom.rawDefinition: A room, often in a school, where classes take place

clock.rawDefinition: An instrument used to measure or keep track of time; a non-portable timepiece.

clothes.rawDefinition: A woven fabric such as used in dressing, decorating, cleaning or other practical use.

club.rawDefinition: An association of members joining together for some common purpose, especially sports or recreation.

coat.rawDefinition: An outer garment covering the upper torso and arms.Wp

coffee.rawDefinition: A beverage made by infusing the beans of the coffee plant in hot water.

cold.rawDefinition: (of a thing) Having a low temperature.

college.rawDefinition: A corporate group; a group of colleagues.

colour.rawDefinition: The spectral composition of visible light

computer.rawDefinition: A person employed to perform computations; one who computes.

concert.rawDefinition: Agreement in a design or plan; union formed by mutual communication of opinions and views; accordance in a scheme; harmony; simultaneous action.

cooking.rawDefinition: To prepare (food) for eating by heating it, often by combining it with other ingredients.

cool.rawDefinition: A moderate or refreshing state of cold; moderate temperature of the air between hot and cold; coolness.

cost.rawDefinition: To incur a charge of; to require payment of a (specified) price.

cup.rawDefinition: A concave vessel for drinking from, usually made of opaque material (as opposed to a glass) and with a handle.

customer.rawDefinition: A patron, a client; one who purchases or receives a product or service from a business or merchant, or intends to do so.

evening.rawDefinition: The time of the day between dusk and night, when it gets dark.

example.rawDefinition: Something that is representative of all such things in a group.

exercise.rawDefinition: Any activity designed to develop or hone a skill or ability.

expensive.rawDefinition: Given to expending a lot of money; profligate, lavish.

eye.rawDefinition: An organ through which animals see (perceive surroundings via light).

face.rawDefinition: The front part of the head of a human or other animal, featuring the eyes, nose and mouth, and the surrounding area.

fall.rawDefinition: The act of moving to a lower position under the effect of gravity.

false.rawDefinition: One of two options on a true-or-false test.

family.rawDefinition: A group of people who are closely related to one another (by blood, marriage or adoption); kin; for example, a set of parents and their children; an immediate family.

famous.rawDefinition: To make famous; to bring renown to.

farm.rawDefinition: A place where agricultural and similar activities take place, especially the growing of crops or the raising of livestock.

farmer.rawDefinition: A person who works the land and/or who keeps livestock, especially on a farm.

fast.rawDefinition: A train that calls at only some stations it passes between its origin and destination, typically just the principal stations

fat.rawDefinition: A specialized animal tissue with a high oil content, used for long-term storage of energy.

father.rawDefinition: A (generally human) male who begets a child.

fill.rawDefinition: To occupy fully, to take up all of.

film.rawDefinition: A thin layer of some substance; a pellicle; a membranous covering, causing opacity.

find.rawDefinition: Anything that is found (usually valuable), as objects on an archeological site or a person with talent.

finish.rawDefinition: An end; the end of anything.

fire.rawDefinition: A (usually self-sustaining) chemical reaction involving the bonding of oxygen with carbon or other fuel, with the production of heat and the presence of flame or smouldering.

first.rawDefinition: The person or thing in the first position.

fish.rawDefinition: A cold-blooded vertebrate animal that lives in water, moving with the help of fins and breathing with gills.

floor.rawDefinition: The interior bottom or surface of a house or building; the supporting surface of a room.

flower.rawDefinition: A colorful, conspicuous structure associated with angiosperms, frequently scented and attracting various insects, and which may or may not be used for sexual reproduction.

fly.rawDefinition: Any insect of the order Diptera; characterized by having two wings (except for some wingless species), also called true flies.

follow.rawDefinition: (sometimes attributive) In billiards and similar games, a stroke causing a ball to follow another ball after hitting it.

food.rawDefinition: Any solid substance that can be consumed by living organisms, especially by eating, in order to sustain life.

foot.rawDefinition: A biological structure found in many animals that is used for locomotion and that is frequently a separate organ at the terminal part of the leg.

football.rawDefinition: (general) A sport played on foot in which teams attempt to get a ball into a goal or zone defended by the other team.

friend.rawDefinition: A person other than a family member, spouse or lover whose company one enjoys and towards whom one feels affection.

friendly.rawDefinition: A game which is of no consequence in terms of ranking, betting etc.

from.rawDefinition: Used to indicate source or provenance.

front.rawDefinition: The foremost side of something or the end that faces the direction it normally moves.

fruit.rawDefinition: (often in the plural) In general, a product of plant growth useful to man or animals.

full.rawDefinition: Containing the maximum possible amount that can fit in the space available.

garden.rawDefinition: An outdoor area containing one or more types of plants, usually plants grown for food or ornamental purposes.

girl.rawDefinition: A female child, adolescent, or a young woman.

girlfriend.rawDefinition: A female partner in an unmarried romantic relationship.

give.rawDefinition: The amount of bending that something undergoes when a force is applied to it; a tendency to yield under pressure; resilence.

grandparent.rawDefinition: To be, or act as, a grandfather to.

great.rawDefinition: A person of major significance, accomplishment or acclaim.

group.rawDefinition: A number of things or persons being in some relation to one another.

guess.rawDefinition: To reach a partly (or totally) unqualified conclusion.

guitar.rawDefinition: A stringed musical instrument, of European origin, usually with a fretted fingerboard and six strings, played with the fingers or a plectrum (guitar pick).

hard.rawDefinition: A firm or paved beach or slope convenient for hauling vessels out of the water.

hat.rawDefinition: A covering for the head, often in the approximate form of a cone or a cylinder closed at its top end, and sometimes having a brim and other decoration.

he.rawDefinition: The game of tag, or it, in which the player attempting to catch the others is called "he".

head.rawDefinition: The part of the body of an animal or human which contains the brain, mouth and main sense organs.

healthy.rawDefinition: Enjoying health and vigor of body, mind, or spirit: well.

hear.rawDefinition: (stative) To perceive sounds through the ear.

help.rawDefinition: Action given to provide assistance; aid.

high.rawDefinition: A high point or position, literally or figuratively; an elevated place; a superior region; a height; the sky; heaven.

him.rawDefinition: Honorific alternative letter-case form of him, sometimes used when referring to God or another important figure who is understood from context.

his.rawDefinition: Honorific alternative letter-case form of his, sometimes used when referring to God or another important figure who is understood from context.

hobby.rawDefinition: An activity that one enjoys doing in one's spare time.

holiday.rawDefinition: A day on which a festival, religious event, or national celebration is traditionally observed.

homework.rawDefinition: Work that is done at home, especially school exercises assigned by a teacher.

hope.rawDefinition: To want something to happen, with a sense of expectation that it might.

horse.rawDefinition: Any of several animals related to Equus ferus caballus.

hospital.rawDefinition: A large medical facility, usually in a building with multiple floors, where seriously ill or injured patients are given extensive medical and/or surgical treatment.

hot.rawDefinition: (with up) To heat; to make or become hot.

hotel.rawDefinition: A large town house or mansion; a grand private residence, especially in France.

i.rawDefinition: The name of the Latin-script letter I.

ice cream.rawDefinition: A dessert made from frozen sweetened cream or a similar substance, usually flavoured.

idea.rawDefinition: An abstract archetype of a given thing, compared to which real-life examples are seen as imperfect approximations; pure essence, as opposed to actual examples.

if.rawDefinition: An uncertainty, possibility, condition, doubt etc.

in.rawDefinition: A position of power or influence, or a way to get it.

interested.rawDefinition: To engage the attention of; to awaken interest in; to excite emotion or passion in, in behalf of a person or thing.

interesting.rawDefinition: To engage the attention of; to awaken interest in; to excite emotion or passion in, in behalf of a person or thing.

internet.rawDefinition: Any set of computer networks that communicate using the Internet Protocol. (An intranet.)

into.rawDefinition: To or towards the inside of.

introduce.rawDefinition: (of people) To cause (someone) to be acquainted (with someone else).

island.rawDefinition: A contiguous area of land, smaller than a continent, totally surrounded by water.

it.rawDefinition: One who is neither a he nor a she; a creature; a dehumanized being.

its.rawDefinition: One who is neither a he nor a she; a creature; a dehumanized being.

jacket.rawDefinition: A piece of clothing worn on the upper body outside a shirt or blouse, often waist length to thigh length.

join.rawDefinition: An intersection of piping or wiring; an interconnect.

juice.rawDefinition: A liquid from a plant, especially fruit.

land.rawDefinition: The part of Earth which is not covered by oceans or other bodies of water.

language.rawDefinition: A body of words, and set of methods of combining them (called a grammar), understood by a community and used as a form of communication.

large.rawDefinition: An old musical note, equal to two longas, four breves, or eight semibreves.

last.rawDefinition: Final, ultimate, coming after all others of its kind.

late.rawDefinition: A shift (scheduled work period) that takes place late in the day or at night.

later.rawDefinition: Near the end of a period of time.

laugh.rawDefinition: An expression of mirth particular to the human species; the sound heard in laughing; laughter.

leave.rawDefinition: To have a consequence or remnant.

leg.rawDefinition: A limb or appendage that an animal uses for support or locomotion.

lesson.rawDefinition: A section of learning or teaching into which a wider learning content is divided.

let.rawDefinition: The allowing of possession of a property etc. in exchange for rent.

library.rawDefinition: An institution which holds books and/or other forms of media for use by the public or qualified people often lending them out, as well as providing various other services for its users.

life.rawDefinition: The state of organisms preceding their death, characterized by biological processes such as metabolism and reproduction and distinguishing them from inanimate objects; the state of being alive and living.

light.rawDefinition: Visible electromagnetic radiation. The human eye can typically detect radiation (light) in the wavelength range of about 400 to 750 nanometers. Nearby shorter and longer wavelength ranges, although not visible, are commonly called ultraviolet and infrared light.

like.rawDefinition: (usually in the plural) Something that a person likes (prefers).

line.rawDefinition: A path through two or more points (compare ‘segment’); a continuous mark, including as made by a pen; any path, curved or straight.

lion.rawDefinition: A big cat, Panthera leo, native to Africa, India and formerly much of Europe.

list.rawDefinition: A strip of fabric, especially from the edge of a piece of cloth.

live.rawDefinition: To be alive; to have life.

lose.rawDefinition: To cause (something) to cease to be in one's possession or capability due to unfortunate or unknown circumstances, events or reasons.

north.rawDefinition: One of the four major compass points, specifically 0°, directed toward the North Pole, and conventionally upwards on a map, abbreviated as N.

nose.rawDefinition: A protuberance on the face housing the nostrils, which are used to breathe or smell.

not.rawDefinition: A unary operation on logical values that changes true to false, and false to true.

nothing.rawDefinition: Something trifling, or of no consequence or importance.

number.rawDefinition: An abstract entity used to describe quantity.

o'clock.rawDefinition: (modifying a numeral, one to twelve) In conjunction with a numeral, indicates the time within a twelve-hour period (midnight to noon or noon to midnight), specifically the time when the hour hand of a clock points precisely to the symbol or marking corresponding to the designated numeral.

off.rawDefinition: (usually in phrases such as 'from the off', 'at the off', etc.) Beginning; starting point.

office.rawDefinition: A ceremonial duty or service, particularly:

old.rawDefinition: (with the, invariable plural only) People who are old; old beings; the older generation, taken as a group.

onion.rawDefinition: A monocotyledonous plant (Allium cepa), allied to garlic, used as vegetable and spice.

online.rawDefinition: To bring (a system, etc.) online; to promote to an active or running state.

or.rawDefinition: Connects at least two alternative words, phrases, clauses, sentences, etc. each of which could make a passage true. In English, this is the "inclusive or." The "exclusive or" is formed by "either [...] or".

orange.rawDefinition: An evergreen tree of the genus Citrus such as Citrus sinensis.

own.rawDefinition: Belonging to; possessed; proper to. Often marks a possessive determiner as reflexive, referring back to the subject of the clause or sentence.

page.rawDefinition: One of the many pieces of paper bound together within a book or similar document.

paint.rawDefinition: A substance that is applied as a liquid or paste, and dries into a solid coating that protects or adds color/colour to an object or surface to which it has been applied.

pair.rawDefinition: Two similar or identical things taken together; often followed by of.

paper.rawDefinition: A sheet material used for writing on or printing on (or as a non-waterproof container), usually made by draining cellulose fibres from a suspension in water.

parent.rawDefinition: One of the two persons from whom one is immediately biologically descended; a mother or father.

park.rawDefinition: An area of land set aside for environment preservation or recreation.

partner.rawDefinition: Someone who is associated with another in a common activity or interest.

party.rawDefinition: A person or group of people constituting a particular side in a contract or legal action.

passport.rawDefinition: An official document normally used for international journeys, which proves the identity and nationality of the person for whom it was issued.

pay.rawDefinition: Money given in return for work; salary or wages.

pen.rawDefinition: An enclosure (enclosed area) used to contain domesticated animals, especially sheep or cattle.

people.rawDefinition: Used as plural of person; a body of human beings considered generally or collectively; a group of two or more persons.

pepper.rawDefinition: A plant of the family Piperaceae.

person.rawDefinition: An individual; usually a human being.

phone.rawDefinition: A device for transmitting conversations and other sounds in real time across distances, now often a small portable unit also capable of running software etc.

photograph.rawDefinition: A picture created by projecting an image onto a photosensitive surface such as a chemically treated plate or film, CCD receptor, etc.

piano.rawDefinition: A percussive keyboard musical instrument, usually ranging over seven octaves, with white and black colored keys, played by pressing these keys, causing hammers to strike strings

picture.rawDefinition: A representation of anything (as a person, a landscape, a building) upon canvas, paper, or other surface, by drawing, painting, printing, photography, etc.

plant.rawDefinition: An organism that is not an animal, especially an organism capable of photosynthesis. Typically a small or herbaceous organism of this kind, rather than a tree.

play.rawDefinition: Activity for amusement only, especially among the young.

police.rawDefinition: A civil force granted the legal authority for law enforcement and maintaining public order.

pool.rawDefinition: A small and rather deep collection of (usually) fresh water, as one supplied by a spring, or occurring in the course of a stream; a reservoir for water.

poor.rawDefinition: (with "the") Those who have little or no possessions or money, taken as a group.

post.rawDefinition: A long dowel or plank protruding from the ground; a fencepost; a lightpost.

potato.rawDefinition: The tuber of a plant, Solanum tuberosum, eaten as a starchy vegetable, particularly in the Americas and Europe; this plant.

pound.rawDefinition: A unit of mass equal to 16 avoirdupois ounces (= 453.592 37 g). Today this value is the most common meaning of "pound" as a unit of weight.

prefer.rawDefinition: To be in the habit of choosing something rather than something else; to favor; to like better.

pretty.rawDefinition: A pretty person; a term of address to a pretty person.

price.rawDefinition: The cost required to gain possession of something.

problem.rawDefinition: A difficulty that has to be resolved or dealt with.

purple.rawDefinition: A colour/color that is a dark blend of red and blue; dark magenta.

put.rawDefinition: A right to sell something at a predetermined price.

question.rawDefinition: A sentence, phrase or word which asks for information, reply or response; an interrogative.

quick.rawDefinition: Raw or sensitive flesh, especially that underneath finger and toe nails.

radio.rawDefinition: The technology that allows for the transmission of sound or other signals by modulation of electromagnetic waves.

rain.rawDefinition: Condensed water falling from a cloud.

read.rawDefinition: A reading or an act of reading, especially an actor's part of a play.

reading.rawDefinition: To look at and interpret letters or other information that is written.

restaurant.rawDefinition: An eating establishment in which diners are served food, usually by waiters at their tables but sometimes (as in a fast food restaurant) at a counter.

rice.rawDefinition: Cereal plants, Oryza sativa of the grass family whose seeds are used as food.

river.rawDefinition: A large and often winding stream which drains a land mass, carrying water down from higher areas to a lower point, oftentimes ending in another body of water, such as an ocean or in an inland sea.

road.rawDefinition: A way used for travelling between places, originally one wide enough to allow foot passengers and horses to travel, now (US) usually one surfaced with asphalt or concrete and designed to accommodate many vehicles travelling in both directions. In the UK both senses are heard: a country road is the same as a country lane.

sad.rawDefinition: To make melancholy; to sadden or grieve (someone).

salad.rawDefinition: A food made primarily of a mixture of raw or cold ingredients, typically vegetables, usually served with a dressing such as vinegar or mayonnaise.

salt.rawDefinition: A common substance, chemically consisting mainly of sodium chloride (NaCl), used extensively as a condiment and preservative.

same.rawDefinition: Not different or other; not another or others; not different as regards self; selfsame; identical.

sandwich.rawDefinition: A dish or foodstuff where two or more slices of bread serve as the wrapper or container of some other food.

say.rawDefinition: A chance to speak; the right or power to influence or make a decision.

school.rawDefinition: (collective) A group of fish or a group of marine mammals such as porpoises, dolphins, or whales.

science.rawDefinition: A particular discipline or branch of learning, especially one dealing with measurable or systematic principles rather than intuition or natural ability.

sea.rawDefinition: A large body of salt water.

second.rawDefinition: Something that is number two in a series.

see.rawDefinition: (stative) To perceive or detect with the eyes, or as if by sight.

send.rawDefinition: The rising motion of water as a wave passes; a surge; the upward angular displacement of a vessel, opposed to pitch, the correlative downward movement.

sentence.rawDefinition: The decision or judgement of a jury or court; a verdict.

shoe.rawDefinition: A protective covering for the foot, with a bottom part composed of thick leather or plastic sole and often a thicker heel, and a softer upper part made of leather or synthetic material. Shoes generally do not extend above the ankle, as opposed to boots, which do.

shop.rawDefinition: An establishment that sells goods or services to the public; originally only a physical location, but now a virtual establishment as well.

shopping.rawDefinition: To visit stores or shops to browse or explore merchandise, especially with the intention of buying such merchandise.

should.rawDefinition: (modal, auxiliary verb, defective) Used before a verb to indicate the simple future tense in the first person singular or plural.

show.rawDefinition: A play, dance, or other entertainment.

shower.rawDefinition: A brief fall of precipitation (spell of rain, or a similar fall of snow, sleet, or cascade).

sick.rawDefinition: Sick people in general as a group.

sing.rawDefinition: A gathering at which people sing songs.

singer.rawDefinition: A person who sings, often professionally.

sister.rawDefinition: A daughter of the same parents as another person; a female sibling.

sit.rawDefinition: Subsidence of the roof of a coal mine.

skirt.rawDefinition: An article of clothing, usually worn by women and girls, that hangs from the waist and covers the lower part of the body.

sleep.rawDefinition: To rest in a state of reduced consciousness.

slow.rawDefinition: Someone who is slow; a sluggard.

small.rawDefinition: Any part of something that is smaller or slimmer than the rest, now usually with anatomical reference to the back.

snake.rawDefinition: A legless reptile of the sub-order Serpentes with a long, thin body and a fork-shaped tongue.

snow.rawDefinition: The frozen, crystalline state of water that falls as precipitation.

song.rawDefinition: A musical composition with lyrics for voice or voices, performed by singing.

soon.rawDefinition: Short in length of time from the present.

sorry.rawDefinition: The act of saying sorry; an apology.

soup.rawDefinition: Any of various dishes commonly made by combining liquids, such as water or stock with other ingredients, such as meat and vegetables, that contribute flavor and texture.

south.rawDefinition: One of the four major compass points, specifically 180°, directed toward the South Pole, and conventionally downwards on a map, abbreviated as S.

speak.rawDefinition: A low class bar, a speakeasy.

special.rawDefinition: A reduction in consumer cost (usually for a limited time) for items or services rendered.

spell.rawDefinition: Words or a formula supposed to have magical powers.

spelling.rawDefinition: To put under the influence of a spell; to affect by a spell; to bewitch; to fascinate; to charm.

spend.rawDefinition: Amount of money spent (during a period); expenditure.

sport.rawDefinition: Any activity that uses physical exertion or skills competitively under a set of rules that is not based on aesthetics.

spring.rawDefinition: To weaken, as a joint, ligament, or muscle, by sudden and excessive exertion, as by wrenching; to overstrain, or stretch injuriously, but without luxation

star.rawDefinition: Any small luminous dot appearing in the cloudless portion of the night sky, especially with a fixed location relative to other such dots.

tomato.rawDefinition: A widely cultivated plant, Solanum lycopersicum, having edible fruit.

tomorrow.rawDefinition: The day after the present day.

tonight.rawDefinition: The nighttime of the current day or date; this night.

tooth.rawDefinition: A hard, calcareous structure present in the mouth of many vertebrate animals, generally used for eating.

tourist.rawDefinition: Someone who travels for pleasure rather than for business.

town.rawDefinition: A settlement; an area with residential districts, shops and amenities, and its own local government; especially one larger than a village and smaller than a city.

traffic.rawDefinition: Pedestrians or vehicles on roads, or the flux or passage thereof.

travel.rawDefinition: The act of traveling; passage from place to place.

tree.rawDefinition: Fast growing function based on Kruskal's tree theorem.

turn.rawDefinition: (heading) to make a non-linear physical movement.

tv.rawDefinition: The assessed value of an asset from which the tax owing is computed.

umbrella.rawDefinition: Cloth-covered frame used for protection against rain or sun.

uncle.rawDefinition: The brother or brother-in-law of one’s parent.

understand.rawDefinition: To grasp a concept fully and thoroughly, especially (of words, statements, art, etc.) to be aware of the meaning of and (of people) to be aware of the intent of.

university.rawDefinition: Institution of higher education (typically accepting students from the age of about 17 or 18, depending on country, but in some exceptional cases able to take younger students) where subjects are studied and researched in depth and degrees are offered.

until.rawDefinition: Up to the time of (something happening).

up.rawDefinition: The direction opposed to the pull of gravity.

us.rawDefinition: (personal) Me and at least one other person; the objective case of we.

useful.rawDefinition: Having a practical or beneficial use.

usually.rawDefinition: Most of the time; less than always, but more than occasionally.

vacation.rawDefinition: Freedom from some business or activity.

village.rawDefinition: A rural habitation of size between a hamlet and a town.

visitor.rawDefinition: Someone who visits someone else; someone staying as a guest.

waiter.rawDefinition: A male or female attendant who serves customers at their tables in a restaurant, café or similar.

wake.rawDefinition: The act of waking, or state of being awake.

walk.rawDefinition: To move on the feet by alternately setting each foot (or pair or group of feet, in the case of animals with four or more feet) forward, with at least one foot on the ground at all times. Compare run.

way.rawDefinition: (heading) To do with a place or places.

we.rawDefinition: (personal) The speakers/writers, or the speaker/writer and at least one other person (not the person being addressed). (This is the exclusive we.)

weather.rawDefinition: The short term state of the atmosphere at a specific time and place, including the temperature, relative humidity, cloud cover, precipitation, wind, etc.

website.rawDefinition: A collection of interlinked web pages on the World Wide Web that are typically accessible from the same base URL and reside on the same server.

week.rawDefinition: Any period of seven consecutive days.

weekend.rawDefinition: The break in the working week, usually two days including the traditional holy or sabbath day. Thus in western countries, Saturday and Sunday.

welcome.rawDefinition: The act of greeting someone’s arrival, especially by saying "Welcome!"; reception.

west.rawDefinition: One of the four principal compass points, specifically 270°, conventionally directed to the left on maps; the direction of the setting sun at an equinox, abbreviated as W.

what.rawDefinition: (Singlish) Used to contradict an underlying assumption held by the interlocutor.

when.rawDefinition: The time at which something happens.

where.rawDefinition: The place in which something happens.

which.rawDefinition: (interrogative) What one or ones (of those mentioned or implied).

white.rawDefinition: The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.

who.rawDefinition: A person under discussion; a question of which person.

wife.rawDefinition: A married woman, especially in relation to her spouse.

will.rawDefinition: (now uncommon or literary) To wish, desire (something).

window.rawDefinition: The inedible parts of a grain-producing plant.

word.rawDefinition: The smallest unit of language that has a particular meaning and can be expressed by itself; the smallest discrete, meaningful unit of language. (contrast morpheme.)

worker.rawDefinition: A person who performs labor for a living, especially manual labor.

world.rawDefinition: (with "the") Human collective existence; existence in general.

would.rawDefinition: Something that would happen, or would be the case, under different circumstances; a potentiality.

write.rawDefinition: The act or style of writing.

writer.rawDefinition: A person who writes, or produces literary work.

writing.rawDefinition: Graphism of symbols such as letters that express some meaning.

wrong.rawDefinition: Something that is immoral or not good.

year.rawDefinition: A solar year, the time it takes the Earth to complete one revolution of the Sun (between 365.24 and 365.26 days depending on the point of reference).

yellow.rawDefinition: The colour of gold, butter, or a lemon; the colour obtained by mixing green and red light, or by subtracting blue from white light.

yes.rawDefinition: An affirmative expression; an answer that shows agreement or acceptance.

yesterday.rawDefinition: The day immediately before today; one day ago.

you.rawDefinition: To address (a person) using the pronoun you (in the past, especially to use you rather than thou, when you was considered more formal).

young.rawDefinition: People who are young; young people, collectively; youth.

apartment.rawDefinition: A complete domicile occupying only part of a building, especially one for rent; a flat.

apple.rawDefinition: A common, round fruit produced by the tree Malus domestica, cultivated in temperate climates.

arm.rawDefinition: The portion of the upper human appendage, from the shoulder to the wrist and sometimes including the hand.

bed.rawDefinition: A piece of furniture, usually flat and soft, on which to rest or sleep.

bedroom.rawDefinition: A room in a house where a bed is kept for sleeping.

beer.rawDefinition: An alcoholic drink fermented from starch material, commonly barley malt, often with hops or some other substance to impart a bitter flavor.

breakfast.rawDefinition: The first meal of the day, usually eaten in the morning.

brother.rawDefinition: Son of the same parents as another person.

brown.rawDefinition: A colour like that of chocolate or coffee.

build.rawDefinition: The physique of a human body; constitution or structure of a human body.

check.rawDefinition: A situation in which the king is directly threatened by an opposing piece.

cheese.rawDefinition: A dairy product made from curdled or cultured milk.

chicken.rawDefinition: A domestic fowl, Gallus gallus, especially when young.

child.rawDefinition: A person who has not yet reached adulthood, whether natural (puberty), cultural (initiation), or legal (majority)

could.rawDefinition: (auxiliary verb, defective) To know how to; to be able to.

country.rawDefinition: (chiefly British) An area of land; a district, region.

cousin.rawDefinition: The child of a person's uncle or aunt; a first cousin.

cow.rawDefinition: (properly) An adult female of the species Bos taurus, especially one that has calved.

cream.rawDefinition: The butterfat/milkfat part of milk which rises to the top; this part when separated from the remainder.

festival.rawDefinition: An event or community gathering, usually staged by a local community, which centers on some theme, sometimes on some unique aspect of the community.

gym.rawDefinition: A sports facility specialized for lifting weights and exercise.

hair.rawDefinition: A pigmented filament of keratin which grows from a follicle on the skin of humans and other mammals.

half.rawDefinition: One of two usually roughly equal parts into which anything may be divided, or considered as divided.

hand.rawDefinition: The part of the forelimb below the forearm or wrist in a human, and the corresponding part in many other animals.

happy.rawDefinition: A happy event, thing, person, etc.

hour.rawDefinition: A time period of sixty minutes; one twenty-fourth of a day.

house.rawDefinition: A structure built or serving as an abode of human beings.

how.rawDefinition: The means by which something is accomplished.

hungry.rawDefinition: Affected by hunger; desiring of food; having a physical need for food.

husband.rawDefinition: The master of a house; the head of a family; a householder.

lot.rawDefinition: A large quantity or number; a great deal.

lunch.rawDefinition: A light meal usually eaten around midday, notably when not as main meal of the day.

no one.rawDefinition: Used in contrast to anyone, someone or everyone: not one person; nobody.

nobody.rawDefinition: Someone who is not important or well-known.

other.rawDefinition: An other, another (person, etc), more often rendered as another.

out.rawDefinition: A means of exit, escape, reprieve, etc.

outside.rawDefinition: The part of something that faces out; the outer surface.

over.rawDefinition: A set of six legal balls bowled.

piece.rawDefinition: A part of a larger whole, usually in such a form that it is able to be separated from other parts.

pig.rawDefinition: Any of several intelligent mammalian species of the genus Sus, having cloven hooves, bristles and a nose adapted for digging; especially the domesticated animal Sus scrofa.

place.rawDefinition: (physical) An area; somewhere within an area.

plan.rawDefinition: A drawing showing technical details of a building, machine, etc., with unwanted details omitted, and often using symbols rather than detailed drawing to represent doors, valves, etc.

really.rawDefinition: In a way or manner that is real, not unreal.

red.rawDefinition: Any of a range of colours having the longest wavelengths, 670 nm, of the visible spectrum; a primary additive colour for transmitted light: the colour obtained by subtracting green and blue from white light using magenta and yellow filters; the colour of blood, ripe strawberries, etc.

sheep.rawDefinition: A woolly ruminant of the genus Ovis.

shirt.rawDefinition: An article of clothing that is worn on the upper part of the body, and often has sleeves, either long or short, that cover the arms.

somebody.rawDefinition: A recognised or important person, a celebrity.

someone.rawDefinition: A partially specified but unnamed person.

something.rawDefinition: An object whose nature is yet to be defined.

trip.rawDefinition: A journey; an excursion or jaunt

trousers.rawDefinition: An article of clothing that covers the part of the body between the waist and the ankles or knees, and is divided into a separate part for each leg.

true.rawDefinition: The state of being in alignment.

t-shirt.rawDefinition: A lightweight shirt without buttons, usually with short sleeves and no collar. Often made of cotton and frequently bears a picture or slogan.

wall.rawDefinition: A rampart of earth, stones etc. built up for defensive purposes.

warm.rawDefinition: Having a temperature slightly higher than usual, but still pleasant; mildly hot.

wash.rawDefinition: The process or an instance of washing or being washed by water or other liquid.

water.rawDefinition: A substance (of molecular formula H₂O) found at room temperature and pressure as a clear liquid; it is present naturally as rain, and found in rivers, lakes and seas; its solid form is ice and its gaseous form is steam.

wine.rawDefinition: An alcoholic beverage made by fermenting the juice of grapes.
